next_steps: Expert hematopathology review of all biopsy samples with specific focus on histiocytic/dendritic markers (CD68, CD163, CD1a, S100, CD21, CD23, CD35)
BRAF V600E mutation testing on bone lesion tissue
Whole-body imaging with specialized focus on the aorta and cardiac structures to evaluate for periaortic coating or pericardial involvement
Quantification of serum IgG4 levels and inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR)
Consideration of PET/CT imaging interpretation for characteristic osteosclerosis of the long bones
